mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_message ( user_id, type, title, content_preview, ref_question_set_id, ref_paper_id, ref_comment_id, actor_user_id, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{contentPreview}, #{refQuestionSetId}, #{refPaperId}, #{refCommentId}, #{actorUserId}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.user_id, m.type, m.title, m.content_preview, m.ref_question_set_id, m.ref_paper_id, m.ref_comment_id, m.actor_user_id, m.read_at, m.created_at, au.nickname AS actor_nickname, au.username AS actor_username FROM user_message m LEFT JOIN user au ON au.id = m.actor_user_id WHERE m.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_message WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_message WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_at IS NULL

SELECT m.id, m.user_id, m.type, m.title, m.content_preview, m.ref_question_set_id, m.ref_paper_id, m.ref_comment_id, m.actor_user_id, m.read_at, m.created_at, au.nickname AS actor_nickname, au.username AS actor_username FROM user_message m LEFT JOIN user au ON au.id = m.actor_user_id WHERE m.user_id = #{userId} AND m.read_at IS NULL ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_message SET read_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND read_at IS NULL
